channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's leadership model faces a succession challenge
item.description: President Trump's dealmaking approach highlights a corporate lesson about the risks of succession.

item.title: Iran conflict gives Chinese automakers a golden opportunity as Detroit lags on EVs
item.description: "As tragic as war is, it is probably one of the best things for Chinese EV makers," an observer noted.

item.title: Inside Trump's vision of America as a shareholder in U.S. firms: 'I should have asked for more'
item.description: Also: All the latest news and watercooler talk from Fortune.

item.title: AI boom draws Europe's top startups to the U.S., often against their plans
item.description: Creadum partner Carl Fritjofsson notes European AI startups are increasingly attracted to U.S. customers and investors, despite Europe's strong talent pool.
